name: Min Soo Kim
tagline: Building safer, more grounded language and multimodal models.
bio: I am a graduate student at Yonsei University, advised by Prof. Albert No in AI-ISL. I work on `language models`, `multimodal learning`, and `AI safety`. Broadly, I am interested in language models and their applications, from large language models and vision-language models to newer generative paradigms such as diffusion-based language models. My research explores how these models reason, generalize, and sometimes fail. Ultimately, I hope to contribute to AI systems that are capable, robust, interpretable, and trustworthy in real-world settings.
currently: Studying alignment of multimodal LLMs under distribution shift
